highlights.title: Samsung Shares Lag SK Hynix’s Rally as Analysts Cite Strike Risk
highlights.description: Samsung Electronics Co. shares’ recent underperformance against SK Hynix Inc. may intensify as a looming workers’ strike weighs on South Korea’s most valuable company versus its rival chipmaker.

highlights.title: Falcon 9 launches South Korean satellite and 45 rideshare payloads
highlights.description:
A Falcon 9 launched a South Korean imaging satellite and dozens of secondary payloads May 3, illustrating the continued demand for SpaceX rideshare launches.
The post Falcon 9 launches South Korean satellite and 45 rideshare payloads appeared first on SpaceNews.

highlights.title: We’ll take it: a TikToker rallies pledges to buy Spirit Airlines after its abrupt weekend collapse
highlights.description: Within hours he'd thrown up a website — a janky, one-hour job, by his own admission — and by Sunday, 36,000 "founding patrons" had pledged nearly $23 million, crashing his servers in the process.

highlights.title: ASX Warns Firms About ‘Ramping’ AI Upside to Push Stock Prices
highlights.description: Australia’s stock exchange operator warned businesses not to exaggerate the impact of artificial intelligence on their operations, saying it monitors the market for instances of so-called ‘ramping’ up of share prices.
